历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 9838 → 8969 → 8670 → 14481 → 13354. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform (changing from arts/science division to physics/history categories), the ranking significantly shifted backward to 14481, and in 2025 it slightly recovered to 13354; fluctuations have been large in recent two years, with the 2025 baseline around 13354. The provincial physics category enrollment plan from 2021 to 2025 was 168 → 165 → 171 → 172 → 173, increasing slightly year by year. The 2026 plan is 221, an expansion of about 27.7% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition pressure, and the ranking number should clearly move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking in 2026 approximately 89th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 84–92, overall stable. Chang'an University shows no obvious negative or positive signals in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal application files; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as "average", with stable application attention.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Transportation Engineering is an A- discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university, highly related to enrollment majors such as road and bridge, traffic engineering, and has some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, with strong regional preference; the number of students enrolled in Gansu accounts for about 1.2%–1.7% of its total national enrollment, a moderately low proportion; engineering majors such as computer science, electronics/communication, electrical engineering continue to be socially popular, matching the university's engineering characteristics. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Gansu in 2026 is about 218,700, estimated at about 147,600 based on the recent physics category proportion of about 67.5%, an increase of about 21.6% compared to 121,443 physics category candidates in 2025, intensifying competition due to the expanded candidate pool.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 13354, the significant expansion of about 27.7% in 2026 (main reason for ranking backward), the increase of physics category candidates in Gansu by about 21.6% (competition intensification partially offsetting the expansion effect), stable university reputation, sustained popularity of engineering majors, and fine-tuning based on candidate pool increase, the predicted minimum ranking for physics category in 2026 is about 15607, with a range of 15107–16107.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Road, Bridge and River Crossing Engineering, Traffic Engineering, Transportation, Vehicle Engineering, Logistics Engineering) (Huawei Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer Science and Technology) (Computer Chang'an Academy Plan)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Internet of Things Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Vehicle Engineering
- Automation Class (Automation, Robot Engineering)
- Electronic Information Class (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence)
- Transportation
- Mechanical Class (Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Civil Class (Civil Engineering, Building Environment and Energy Application Engineering, Water Supply and Drainage Science and Engineering)
- Materials Class (Materials Science and Engineering, Materials Forming and Control Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Geology Class (Geology, Resource Exploration Engineering, Mineral Processing Engineering, Carbon Storage Science and Engineering)
- Architecture Class (Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Landscape Architecture)
- Business Administration Class (Business Administration, Accounting).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 15107–16107, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 15107), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Engineering Experimental Classes (Huawei Class/Computer Chang'an Academy) and popular majors like Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 15500), mainly choose Tier 2 majors such as Vehicle Engineering, Automation Class, Transportation, etc.; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (16107), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors such as Civil Class, Materials Class, etc. as safety to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1775 → 1571 → 1439 → 1753 → 2694. Rankings moved forward year by year from 2021 to 2023, then shifted backward to 1753 in 2024 after the new college entrance exam reform, and significantly shifted backward to 2694 in 2025. Fluctuations have been large in the past two years, with a baseline of about 2694 in 2025. The provincial history category enrollment plans from 2021 to 2025 were 12 → 10 → 8 → 9 → 14 students, expanding to 14 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 9 students, a reduction of about 35.7% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition, and the ranking number should clearly move forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 89th, with recent rankings stable between 84 and 92. Chang'an University shows no obvious negative or positive signals in reputation evaluations, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission files. Its Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 83rd, rated as 'average', with stable application attention. Transportation Engineering is an A- discipline, but the history category enrollment majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, Public Administration, English, Ideological and Political Education, etc.) have low relevance to the university's advantageous engineering fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially popular (recommended), Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, and Business Administration is recommended. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province is about 218,700. Estimated at about 32.5% history category proportion in recent years, this is about 71,078 people, an increase of about 21.8% compared to the 2025 history category of 58,374, expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Chang'an University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, with strong regional preference. The proportion of its enrollment in Gansu to its total national enrollment is about 1.2%–1.7%, a moderately low level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 2694, a significant enrollment reduction of about 35.7% in 2026 (main reason for ranking moving forward), an increase of about 21.8% in Gansu history category candidates (further pushing rankings forward due to intensified competition), stable school reputation, and fine-tuning with the increase in candidate numbers, the predicted 2026 history category minimum ranking is about 2137, with a range of 1637–2637.
